items.text:
[%CASE
WHEN length( @project_basename ) = 10 or length( @project_basename ) = 8
THEN
attribute(get_feature('NRO_RIP','TYPE_FONCT','NOEUD DE RACCORDEMENT OPTIQUE' ) ,'CODE') ||  '\n'  ||
attribute(get_feature('NRO_RIP','TYPE_FONCT','NOEUD DE RACCORDEMENT OPTIQUE' ) ,'ADRESSE') ||' - ' ||   attribute(get_feature('NRO_RIP','TYPE_FONCT','NOEUD DE RACCORDEMENT OPTIQUE') ,'CP') || ' ' || attribute(get_feature('NRO_RIP','TYPE_FONCT','NOEUD DE RACCORDEMENT OPTIQUE') ,'VILLE')


WHEN length( @project_basename ) = 12
THEN
substr(attribute(get_feature('BTS','TYPE_FONCT','FM' ) ,'REF_PHFM'),1,19) ||  '\n'  ||
attribute(get_feature('BTS','TYPE_FONCT','FM' ) ,'ADRESSE') ||' - ' ||   attribute(get_feature('BTS','TYPE_FONCT','FM') ,'CP') || ' ' || attribute(get_feature('BTS','TYPE_FONCT','FM') ,'VILLE')


WHEN length( @project_basename ) = 5
THEN
attribute(get_feature('NRA','TYPE_FONCT','NOEUD DE RACCORDEMENT' ) ,'NOM') ||  '\n'  ||
attribute(get_feature('NRA','TYPE_FONCT','NOEUD DE RACCORDEMENT' ) ,'ADRESSE') ||' - ' ||   attribute(get_feature('NRA','TYPE_FONCT','NOEUD DE RACCORDEMENT') ,'CP') || ' ' || attribute(get_feature('NRA','TYPE_FONCT','NOEUD DE RACCORDEMENT') ,'VILLE')



WHEN length( @project_basename ) = 11
THEN

attribute(get_feature('NRA','NOM',substr(@project_basename,1,5) ) ,'NOM') ||  ' : '  ||
attribute(get_feature('NRA','NOM',substr(@project_basename,1,5) ) ,'ADRESSE') ||' ' ||   attribute(get_feature('NRA','NOM',substr(@project_basename,1,5) ) ,'CP') || ' ' || attribute(get_feature('NRA','NOM',substr(@project_basename,1,5) ) ,'VILLE')
||  '\n'  ||
attribute(get_feature('NRA','NOM',substr(@project_basename,7,5) ) ,'NOM') ||  ' : '  ||
attribute(get_feature('NRA','NOM',substr(@project_basename,7,5) ) ,'ADRESSE') ||' ' ||   attribute(get_feature('NRA','NOM',substr(@project_basename,7,5) ) ,'CP') || ' ' || attribute(get_feature('NRA','NOM',substr(@project_basename,7,5) ) ,'VILLE')

END%]
